name: Citizens State Bank
description_short: Corrigan, TX's Citizens State Bank at 300 N Home St serves the community with banking services.
description_long:
Citizens State Bank's Corrigan, TX branch is located at 300 N Home St, providing banking services to the local community as a standalone location. The Corrigan bank serves customers looking for personal and business banking solutions in a convenient local setting.

This Citizens State Bank branch in Corrigan, TX offers checking accounts, savings accounts, loan products, and other financial services to meet the needs of local residents and businesses. Contact the Corrigan location directly for information about current rates, account options, and services available.

When visiting Citizens State Bank in Corrigan, TX, bring a valid government-issued ID for account services and transactions. Local customers rely on this Corrigan bank for everyday financial needs, from deposits and withdrawals to loan applications and financial planning assistance.
services: Certificates of Deposit with terms from 182 days to 5 years (minimum $1,000)
Individual Retirement Account CDs with 18-month terms (minimum $100)
Mortgage loans for home purchase and refinancing
Personal loans (auto, boat, RV, mobile home, appliance, vacation, college)
pros: FDIC-insured deposits backed by full faith and credit of U.S. Government
Long institutional history—chartered in 1919 with over 100 years of operations
Locally owned bank holding company structure ensures community-focused decision making
Low minimum balances to open accounts: $50 for savings, $250 for checking
24-hour ATMs and night depositories at both branch locations
Personalized customer service with commitment to speaking with actual people, not automated systems
Multiple account types including business accounts, IRAs, and CDs with flexible terms from 182 days to 5 years
cons: Limited geographic footprint—only two branch locations in rural Polk County, Texas; not accessible to customers outside the area
Current APY rates not published online; customers must contact bank directly to compare rates, hindering rate shopping
Website provides minimal detail on loan terms, rates, or eligibility requirements for mortgage and personal loans
Small community bank with limited online banking features compared to larger national institutions
No mention of investment services, wealth management, or advanced financial products beyond basic banking
best_for: Residents of Polk County, Texas seeking a relationship-based community bank with personalized service
Small business owners and agricultural operations in the East Texas piney woods region requiring local lending relationships
Customers prioritizing FDIC-insured safety and traditional banking over digital-first convenience
Individuals seeking low-minimum savings and CD products without aggressive rate competition pressures
diagnosis: Citizens State Bank is best for customers in Polk County, Texas or nearby rural areas who value personalized service from a stable, locally-owned institution and are willing to contact the bank directly for rate information. The main caveat is geographic limitation—this is not a viable option for customers outside the immediate service area, and even within the region, the lack of published rate information and limited digital functionality may disadvantage rate-conscious or digitally-focused customers compared to larger regional or national banks.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
meta_description: Corrigan, TX's Citizens State Bank at 300 N Home St. Banking services for the local community.
